physicalDetails.detail: Seventeen at most, in a brown coat with grain dust thick on his knees and cuffs from hiding inside the granary.

voiceMarkers.detail: Fear drives him into the wrong answers first. He gives his name before the operational truth and never recovers control of the conversation.

beliefs.belief: If capture comes, destroy the evidence and die before giving up the people above him.

emotionalStateAtChapterEnd.state: Terrified from the moment the trap closes on him.

decisionsThisChapter.detail: Reaches for the lamp and the broken vessel to burn evidence when the sacks are exposed.
Gives his name under pressure but protects the chain above him.
Uses a hidden poison capsule before questioning can begin.

abilitiesDemonstrated.ability: Monitors the granary as a live operative placed to destroy evidence if discovery comes.

bodyLanguagePatterns.detail: One hand keeps reaching toward the lamp even after the chance is gone; fear shows in the shake he cannot stop.

knowledge.detail: Knows enough to watch the back half of the granary and to understand capture is not survivable for him.

arc.currentPosition: A disposable village-level operative whose death proves the network is organized and prepared for capture.
